name: Deadlift Ladder (2009 Games)

movements.notes: starting weight; 1 rep every 30 seconds, increasing 10 lb each round (men to 505 lb, women to 375 lb)

description: A deadlift ladder adding 10 lb every 30 seconds until failure — rewards both starting strength and the ability to keep making lifts as the bar gets heavier.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2009/2 (official CrossFit Games event, individual division confirmed), retrieved 2026-07-10
